name: OpenCode
description: The open source AI coding agent
compose:
name: slashnode-opencode
services:
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/anomalyco/opencode:1.17.11
    container_name: opencode
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command:
      - serve
      - '--hostname'
      - 0.0.0.0
      - '--port'
      - '4096'
    environment:
      HOME: /home/opencode
    volumes:
      - app_data-opencode:/home/opencode/
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:4096:4096
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data-opencode:
    name: slashnode-opencode_app_data-opencode
